questions.prompt: Как правильно передать в косвенной речи: 'Не смотри на экран.'?

choices.text: He told me not to look at the screen.
He told me not to do look at the screen.
He told me to not look at the screen.
He told me not look at the screen.

questions.explanation: В отрицательных командах частица not ставится перед инфинитивом без do, то есть "not to + V1".

choices.text: She asked them not to speak loudly.
She asked them not to do speak loudly.
She asked them to not speak loudly.
She asked them not speak loudly.

questions.explanation: Правильная структура: told/asked + object + not to + V1. Частица not не требует вспомогательного do.

choices.text: The teacher told the students not to open the door.
The teacher told the students not to do open the door.
The teacher told the students to not open the door.
The teacher told the students not open the door.

questions.explanation: Отрицательные команды передаются через not to + V1. Вариант с do или 'to not' является ошибкой.

choices.text: They told us not to eat here.
They told us not to do eat here.
They told us to not eat here.
They told us not eat here.

questions.explanation: Правильная форма: not to + V1. Добавление do или изменение порядка 'to not' неверно.

choices.text: She asked him not to forget to call.
She asked him not to do forget to call.
She asked him to not forget to call.
She asked him not forget to call.

questions.explanation: В отрицательных командах используется структура not to + V1. Ошибки: добавление do или 'to not'.

choices.text: The teacher told the class not to use their phones.
The teacher told the class not to do use their phones.
The teacher told the class to not use their phones.
The teacher told the class not use their phones.

questions.explanation: Проверка: частица not перед инфинитивом, без do. Варианты с do или 'to not' ошибочны.

choices.text: She asked us not to make noise.
She asked us not to do make noise.
She asked us to not make noise.
She asked us not make noise.

questions.explanation: Отрицательные команды передаются через not to + V1. Другие варианты нарушают структуру.

choices.text: My mother told me not to go out.
My mother told me not to do go out.
My mother told me to not go out.
My mother told me not go out.

questions.explanation: Правильная структура: told + object + not to + V1. Ошибки: добавление do или пропуск 'to'.

choices.text: The doctor told him not to smoke.
The doctor told him not to do smoke.
The doctor told him to not smoke.
The doctor told him not smoke.

questions.explanation: В отрицательных командах частица not стоит перед инфинитивом, без do. Варианты с do или 'to not' ошибочны.

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать: 'Не забудьте сделать задание.'?

choices.text: She asked me not to forget to do the homework.
She asked me not to do forget to do the homework.
She asked me to not forget to do the homework.
She asked me not forget to do the homework.

questions.explanation: Правильная форма: not to + V1 (forget). Другие варианты содержат грамматические ошибки.
